translation.whereYouCan: where you can find anything you want.
translation.desc_p1_SobreMim: Full Stack Developer with more than 3 years of experience in corporate digital products, system integrations and cloud applications, with a focus on scalability, security and high availability.
translation.desc_p2_SobreMim: I worked as a developer at B3, delivering Internet Banking solutions with Oracle Integration Cloud, VBCS and Oracle Autonomous Database, following regulated security and governance standards.
translation.desc_p3_SobreMim: Experience with HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Angular, C# and .NET, with a focus on Cloud, REST APIs, CI/CD, automated tests and Clean Architecture.
translation.desc_p4_SobreMim: In my free time, I enjoy traveling with my girlfriend, celebrating with my family, playing video games, playing the guitar and listening to music while: making food, cleaning the house or going to the gym.
translation.desc_modal1_services: Service with more than 3 years of experience. I offer quality work to clients and companies.
translation.item1_modal1_services: React Js como ferramenta principal, used by the world's largest companies, like Facebook and Tesla;
translation.item2_modal1_services: Integration and continuous delivery in a variety of ways;
translation.item3_modal1_services: Web performance: get the best quality and speed with great content;
translation.item4_modal1_services: I have experience in large hosting and domain platforms such as Hostinger and HostiGator (Brazil);
translation.item5_modal1_services: Adaptation and Responsiveness: application compatible with any type of screen and device, whether mobile, desktop or tablet.
translation.desc_modal2_services: Service with a beautiful interface, modern and functional is the key to keep the user inside the application, and even come back more often.
translation.item1_modal2_services: The best possible user interface and experience, following all requested standards;
translation.item2_modal2_services: Creation of icons, logos, among other design elements;
translation.item3_modal2_services: Accessibility to the project, both visually and functionally;
translation.desc_modal3_services: In order to leverage the project, making it scalable, I offer a final product that involves digital marketing strategies.
translation.item1_modal3_services: Addressability: accurate targeting of specific audiences;
translation.item2_modal3_services: Tracking: measured audience, engagement and return of user actions, in a simple and automated way;
translation.item3_modal3_services: Accessibility: availability of content for users to consume for as long as they want;
translation.item4_modal3_services: Malleability: any Landing Page can be changed, reevaluated, restarted and even paid for whenever you want.
translation.item5_modal3_services: Interactivity: creation of communication between company and user, through comments, chats, feedbacks, among others.
